name: cherrystone/searchable-faq-accordion
title: Searchable FAQ Accordion
description: Interactive, fully filterable FAQ accordion block for founders and members.

lede.default: Quick answers about our checks, schedules, diligence procedures, and network access requirements.

default.question: Do you sign Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDAs)?
default.answer: As an angel network reviewing hundreds of applications, we do not sign NDAs. We treat all founder materials with high confidentiality.

default.question: What is Cherrystone's typical check size?
default.answer: Our pooled investments typically range between $250k and $1M. We frequently co-invest with venture capital syndicates.

default.question: How fast is your screening and funding process?
default.answer: We aim to complete screening and deep diligence within 4 to 6 weeks. Pitch Nights are hosted monthly in Providence.
